project_type: Next.js 15 App Router + TypeScript frontend with FastAPI backend
build_system: pnpm with Next.js build, no brazil
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify no type errors. 2. Run npm run lint to check linting. 3. Run npm run test for unit tests.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && pnpm install (already done, node_modules present)
environment_constraints: Node.js available, pnpm available, no Docker daemon needed for frontend builds. DO NOT modify: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, Providers.tsx, entity/, mcp-servers/, shared/
contribution_requirements: Do not modify restricted files. Use CSS variables for theming. Follow existing Tailwind + framer-motion patterns.
key_patterns: Components use 'use client' directive. Framer-motion for animations. @dnd-kit/core for drag-drop. CSS variables for theming (--bg, --surface, --text-primary, etc.). ROW_HEIGHT = 64px constant for time grid. Events positioned absolutely in relative day columns. AIChatPanel slides from right with framer-motion spring animation. SpotifyMiniPlayer uses framer-motion drag with useMotionValue.
directory_structure: frontend/app/ - Next.js app router pages. frontend/components/ - Reusable components (chat/, ai/, layout/, ui/, voice/, entity/). frontend/lib/ - API helpers. frontend/hooks/ - Custom hooks. frontend/__tests__/ - Test files.
